data.change_summary: All three follow-up amendments from the conditionally-approved review were already applied in the prior attempt. This attempt verifies the fixes remain clean: (1) ProcessBackendAdapter invoke test `claude_envelope_with_usage_populates_token_counts` feeds a Claude envelope with full usage and asserts all five token_counts fields through the adapter; (2) two OpenRouter invoke tests `invoke_maps_anthropic_cache_tokens_to_envelope` and `invoke_maps_openai_prompt_tokens_details_cached_tokens_to_envelope` verify both Anthropic-native and OpenAI prompt_tokens_details cache token formats through the full adapter output; (3) AgentExecutionService tracing test `service_emits_invocation_completed_trace_with_token_fields` captures the structured 'invocation completed' event using a SharedWriter-backed tracing_subscriber and asserts all 12 required fields are present.

steps.description: Verified ProcessBackendAdapter invoke test claude_envelope_with_usage_populates_token_counts passes (asserts prompt=1200, completion=350, total=1550, cache_read=800, cache_creation=100)
Verified OpenRouter invoke test invoke_maps_anthropic_cache_tokens_to_envelope passes (asserts cache_read=150, cache_creation=30 from Anthropic-native fields)
Verified OpenRouter invoke test invoke_maps_openai_prompt_tokens_details_cached_tokens_to_envelope passes (asserts cache_read=200 from prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens)

Verified AgentExecutionService tracing test service_emits_invocation_completed_trace_with_token_fields passes (asserts all 12 structured fields including tokens_reported=true and cache_reported=false)
Verified full test suite: cargo test (332 lib + 128 cli + 1 tmux + 668 unit = 1129 total, 0 failures)
Verified cargo test --features test-stub agent_execution_test: 12 tests passed including tracing test

validation_evidence: cargo test: 332 lib + 128 cli + 1 tmux + 668 unit = 1129 tests passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored
cargo test --features test-stub -- agent_execution_test: 12 passed, 0 failed (includes service_emits_invocation_completed_trace_with_token_fields)
cargo clippy -- -D warnings: clean, no warnings
cargo fmt --check: clean, no formatting issues
Invoke-level Claude test claude_envelope_with_usage_populates_token_counts: passes with prompt=1200, completion=350, total=1550, cache_read=800, cache_creation=100
Invoke-level OpenRouter test invoke_maps_anthropic_cache_tokens_to_envelope: passes with cache_read=150, cache_creation=30
Invoke-level OpenRouter test invoke_maps_openai_prompt_tokens_details_cached_tokens_to_envelope: passes with cache_read=200, cache_creation=None
Tracing test service_emits_invocation_completed_trace_with_token_fields: passes, asserts all 12 fields present in captured trace output
